name: @autostackup/marketing
description: The only marketing MCP you'll ever need. Professionally crafted using Philip Kotler's 9-element framework — the same methodology taught at Harvard, INSEAD, and used by every Fortune 500 CMO. Run a full marketing mix audit, build a complete Meta + Google IMC campaign with budget allocation and creative brief, and map your audience into segments with a messaging matrix — all inside Claude. What agencies charge $15,000/month for, you get in one prompt.
